findings.one_line: The proof says all active normals annihilate h although s_mu is their sum and s_mu^T h=1; it must restrict this to the zero active normals before the rank argument is valid.
The supplied fetched source record contains no Section 3.1 statement establishing the asserted general equality-and-attainment result, so this cited substrate is not source-matched.
The supplied fetched source record contains no Section 4.2/Theorem 4 statement from which the l>=3 lower-dual vertex-family and M-distinctness claim can be checked.

cited_checks.note: The supplied fetched TeX extract and locator do not include the Section 3.1 duality result or an attainment statement; hence the claimed general substrate cannot be compared to the source record.

The supplied attested source statement says the algorithm solves linear programs in polynomial time, and its attestation specifies the exact rational optimization and polynomial arithmetic bounds used here.
The injected audit expressly marks the Corollary 1/Table 1 source unavailable and supplies no verbatim statement; this is an external-verification checkpoint, not a mathematical finding.

Although the source is labeled fetched, the supplied extract contains neither Section 4.2 nor Theorem 4; it does not permit comparison of the claimed multivalued-instrument vertex and M-distinctness conclusion.
